cross_scene_arcs.title: Crawford's Guidance to Graduation
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Crawford recognizes Clarice's performance, assigns her to observe Lecter and later to analyze evidence, showing increasing respect, culminating in her graduation as an FBI agent with his proud acknowledgment.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: Praised trainee summoned by Section Chief Crawford.
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: Graduate FBI agent acknowledged by Crawford.

cross_scene_arcs.title: Uncovering the Killer's Motive
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Clarice discovers physical evidence and, through exchanges with Lecter, gains insights that lead to a breakthrough understanding of Buffalo Bill's motive to create a skin suit from victims.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: Discovering a severed head as key evidence in the investigation.
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: Realizing the connection between sewing patterns and victim wounds, revealing the killer's motive.
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: How to apply this insight to locate and apprehend Buffalo Bill.

cross_scene_arcs.title: Quid-Pro-Quo with Lecter
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Clarice's interactions with Lecter begin with a formal request, evolve into exchanges of personal trauma for investigative leads, and continue with an unsettling call after her graduation.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: Initial meeting where Lecter identifies her as Crawford's trainee.
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: Post-graduation contact from Lecter, renewing their adversarial connection.
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: Lecter's whereabouts and the potential for future interactions.

cross_scene_arcs.title: Clarice Starling Manipulation
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Lecter establishes a transactional mentorship with Clarice, offering case insights in exchange for personal disclosures and promises, evolving into a final phone call with emotional undertones.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: Offers a lead on Miss Mofet in exchange for Clarice's professional advancement.
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: In hiding, calls Clarice to warn her and express that the world is better with her in it.
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: Clarice's refusal to promise not to pursue him.

cross_scene_arcs.title: Escape to Freedom
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Lecter prepares and executes a violent escape from custody, culminating in commandeering an ambulance to flee towards the airport.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: Crafts a makeshift key from a pen clip while imprisoned.
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: In control of an ambulance, driving towards Memphis International Airport.
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: His subsequent escape route or destination after the airport.

cross_scene_arcs.title: Conflict with Authorities
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Lecter undermines other investigators to a Senator and later threatens Dr. Chilton with violence, asserting control over his adversaries.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: Discredits Jack Crawford and Clarice Starling to Senator Martin while providing misleading information.
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: Holds a pen-knife over a bound Dr. Chilton, poised to begin retribution.
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: Whether Lecter carries out his threat against Chilton and the consequences.

cross_scene_arcs.title: Crawford's Mentorship of Clarice
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Crawford evolves from assigning Clarice as a trainee to observe Lecter, mentoring her on case analysis, entrusting her with critical negotiations, covertly supporting her unauthorized mission, and finally comforting her with paternal pride after her success.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: Establishes professional mentor-protégé dynamic with Clarice.
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: Deep emotional bond with paternal pride after comforting her.

cross_scene_arcs.title: Buffalo Bill Investigation Leadership
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Crawford directs the investigation into Buffalo Bill, initiating profiling, strategizing fake deals with Lecter, coercing clinic records, and racing against a deadline, but is ultimately removed from command after conflicts and Lecter's escape.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: Initiates psychobehavioral profiling project to catch serial killers.
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: Removed from command of the investigation, losing official authority.
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: Investigation continues without his leadership, with Buffalo Bill still at large.

cross_scene_arcs.title: Personal Burden and Professional Sacrifice
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Crawford cares for his comatose wife Bella, which burdens him personally and intersects with his professional life, leading to compassionate leave and removal from active duty as the investigation intensifies.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: Managing wife's terminal illness while overseeing FBI investigations.
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: Placed on compassionate leave, separating personal crises from professional role.
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: Wife's terminal condition remains unresolved, and his career is impacted.

cross_scene_arcs.title: Ethical Conflicts and Authority Clashes
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Crawford justifies deceptive methods to Clarice, uses coercive tactics with Dr. Danielson, and clashes with superiors like Krendler, resulting in his removal from command and highlighting ongoing ethical tensions in the investigation.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: Defends strategic deception and coercion as necessary for the case.
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: Removed from command after a near-physical confrontation with Krendler.
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: Ethical dilemmas in investigation methods persist unresolved.
